'''鈭歱-th-f''' ('''pathafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulcer|ulcer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulcer|ulcer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-th-f
|-
! Lemma
| pathafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathafithi|pathafithi]] || [[word:pathafiji|pathafiji]] || [[word:pathafishi|pathafishi]] || [[word:pathafi|pathafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathafuthuth|pathafuthuth]] || [[word:pathafujuj|pathafujuj]] || [[word:pathafushush|pathafushush]] || [[word:pathaf|pathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathafuthu|pathafuthu]] || [[word:pathafuju|pathafuju]] || [[word:pathafushu|pathafushu]] || [[word:pathafu|pathafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathafufuth|pathafufuth]] || [[word:pathafufuj|pathafufuj]] || [[word:pathafufush|pathafufush]] || [[word:pathafuf|pathafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathafethe|pathafethe]] || [[word:pathafeje|pathafeje]] || [[word:pathafeshe|pathafeshe]] || [[word:pathafe|pathafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathafothoth|pathafothoth]] || [[word:pathafojoj|pathafojoj]] || [[word:pathafoshosh|pathafoshosh]] || [[word:pathaf|pathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathafotho|pathafotho]] || [[word:pathafojo|pathafojo]] || [[word:pathafosho|pathafosho]] || [[word:pathafo|pathafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathafofoth|pathafofoth]] || [[word:pathafofoj|pathafofoj]] || [[word:pathafofosh|pathafofosh]] || [[word:pathafof|pathafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathaf忙th忙|pathaf忙th忙]] || [[word:pathaf忙j忙|pathaf忙j忙]] || [[word:pathaf忙sh忙|pathaf忙sh忙]] || [[word:pathaf忙|pathaf忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathafathath|pathafathath]] || [[word:pathafajaj|pathafajaj]] || [[word:pathafashash|pathafashash]] || [[word:pathaf|pathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathafatha|pathafatha]] || [[word:pathafaja|pathafaja]] || [[word:pathafasha|pathafasha]] || [[word:pathafa|pathafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathafafath|pathafafath]] || [[word:pathafafaj|pathafafaj]] || [[word:pathafafash|pathafafash]] || [[word:pathafaf|pathafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pathafasha|pathafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopathafasha|gopathafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipathafasha|gokipathafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pathafn眉sha|pathafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopathafnkn眉sha|gopathafnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipathafn眉sha|gokipathafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pathafsh毛sha|pathafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopathafnksh毛sha|gopathafnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipathafsh毛sha|gokipathafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathafrosha|pathafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathafnkrosha|gopathafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathafrosha|gokipathafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pathafmusha|pathafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathafnkmusha|gopathafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathafmusha|gokipathafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pathafsherasha|pathafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopathafnksherasha|gopathafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipathafsherasha|gokipathafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pathafngasha|pathafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopathafnkngasha|gopathafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipathafngasha|gokipathafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pathafyasha|pathafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopathafnkyasha|gopathafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipathafyasha|gokipathafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pathafyamasha|pathafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopathafnkyamasha|gopathafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipathafyamasha|gokipathafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathafn眉sh毛sha|pathafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathafnkn眉sh毛sha|gopathafnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathafn眉sh毛sha|gokipathafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathafn眉rosha|pathafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathafnkn眉rosha|gopathafnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathafn眉rosha|gokipathafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathafn眉musha|pathafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathafnkn眉musha|gopathafnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathafn眉musha|gokipathafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathafsh毛n眉sha|pathafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathafnksh毛n眉sha|gopathafnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathafsh毛n眉sha|gokipathafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathafsh毛rosha|pathafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathafnksh毛rosha|gopathafnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathafsh毛rosha|gokipathafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathafsh毛musha|pathafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathafnksh毛musha|gopathafnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathafsh毛musha|gokipathafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathafron眉sha|pathafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathafnkron眉sha|gopathafnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathafron眉sha|gokipathafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathafrosh毛sha|pathafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathafnkrosh毛sha|gopathafnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathafrosh毛sha|gokipathafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathafromusha|pathafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathafnkromusha|gopathafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathafromusha|gokipathafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathafmun眉sha|pathafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathafnkmun眉sha|gopathafnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathafmun眉sha|gokipathafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathafmush毛sha|pathafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathafnkmush毛sha|gopathafnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathafmush毛sha|gokipathafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathafmurosha|pathafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathafnkmurosha|gopathafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathafmurosha|gokipathafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pathaf|pathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙th忙f|p忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopathaf|hopathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙th忙f|hop忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopathaf|hohopathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙th忙f|hohop忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉pathaf|n眉pathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙th忙f|n眉p忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉pathaf|n眉n眉pathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙th忙f|n眉n眉p忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂pathaf|n茂pathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙th忙f|n茂p忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂pathaf|n茂n茂pathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙th忙f|n茂n茂p忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupathaf|lupathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙th忙f|lup忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupathaf|lulupathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙th忙f|lulup忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipathaf|lipathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙th忙f|lip忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipathaf|lilipathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙th忙f|lilip忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopathaf|kopathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙th忙f|kop忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopathaf|kokopathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙th忙f|kokop忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepathaf|kepathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙th忙f|kep忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepathaf|kekepathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙th忙f|kekep忙th忙f]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
